description: Runtime bootstrap manifest for the Parthenon Community installer. The Rust installer uses this contract as the boundary for downloading and verifying a minimal installer bundle.

source_policy.goal: Stop requiring end users to clone the full Parthenon repository before install.
source_policy.next_mode: signed release manifest with pinned image digests
source_policy.known_gap: The Community runtime compose profile removes backend/frontend source bind mounts for normal installs, but release channels still need signed artifacts and pinned image digests.

phases.name: preflight
phases.detail: Check OS, Python, Docker, disk, ports, and selected services before download or install.

phases.name: download
phases.detail: Download the versioned installer bundle selected by the user or release channel.

phases.name: verify
phases.detail: Verify every bundle file against the manifest checksum before execution.

phases.name: configure
phases.detail: Collect Community defaults and keep generated JSON/internal files out of the default user experience.

phases.name: prepare-data-target
phases.detail: Connect to, create, or inspect the OMOP CDM target before services start.

phases.name: start-services
phases.detail: Start selected Docker services and wait for health checks.

phases.name: finalize
phases.detail: Create the admin account, register data source mappings, and write diagnostics.
